exception.message: Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: Cannot start the 'com.saucelabs.mydemoapp.android' application. Consider checking the driver's troubleshooting documentation. Original error: 'com.saucelabs.mydemoapp.android.view.activities.SplashActivity' never started. Consider checking the driver's troubleshooting documentation.
